Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First, lets list out all the keys the DECLARE dict needs to have First, the four single activity constraints existence absence exactly one init

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First, init these are activities that must start the process Whats the first step here Idea Generation IG is the very first right So init will have IG with support 1 0 and confidence 1 0

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then existence these are activities that must occur at least once in every trace all the listed activities are part of the standard process right So existence would have all activities

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Absence these are activities that must never occur in this scenario do we have any no the scenario doesnt mention any forbidden activities so absence would be empty

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Exactly one activities that occur exactly once per trace Which ones IG makes sense AG is exactly one FL is exactly one

Name: Validation - PE
Text: What about others Technical Feasibility Check might be done multiple times if design changes Cost Evaluation too Prototype maybe multiple iterations Testing too Marketing Plan maybe revised So exactly one would be IG AG FL

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now the binary constraints right The ones with two activities each Lets go through each type

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First responded existence if A occurs then B must occur at least once For example PC LT PC UT AG MP IG DD

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Coexistence both A and B occur or neither Are there any such pairs maybe TFC and CE maybe LT and UT maybe no coexistence lets move on maybe come back

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Response if A occurs then B must occur after A So IG DD DD TFC DD CE TFC PC CE PC PC LT PC UT LT AG UT AG AG MP MP FL AG FL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Precedence if B occurs then A must have occurred before B Thats the reverse of response

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Succession both response and precedence so thats a stronger constraint For example IG and DD DD and TFC DD and CE TFC and PC CE and PC PC and LT PC and UT LT and AG UT and AG AG and MP MP and FL AG and FL

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait lets get it right Alternate constraints are for when the pattern alternates maybe there are no alternate constraints here So maybe those alt keys have empty dicts

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then chainresponse every occurrence of A is immediately followed by an occurrence of B So maybe only IG DD AG MP MP FL are chainresponse

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then chainprecedence this is if B occurs then A must occur immediately before B So chainprecedence would be IG DD AG MP MP FL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Chainsuccession both chainresponse and chainprecedence so thats the same as the pairs we just mentioned IG DD AG MP MP FL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now the negative constraints noncoexistence are there any such pairs no in this scenario all activities are part of the standard process so noncoexistence is empty

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Nonsuccession maybe there are no nonsuccession constraints here because all the order is positive So maybe nonsuccession is empty

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Nonchainsuccession maybe the only one is AG FL but the chain constraints already imply that so maybe nonchainsuccession is empty

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So we need to have all these keys in the dict

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Init only IG Existence all activities Absence empty Exactly one IG AG FL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Response lets list all the relevant ones covering the process flow IG DD DD TFC DD CE TFC PC CE PC PC LT PC UT LT AG UT AG AG MP AG FL MP FL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Precedence the reverse of the response pairs DD IG TFC DD CE DD PC TFC PC CE LT PC UT PC AG LT AG UT MP AG FL AG FL MP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Succession would include all those pairs IG DD DD TFC DD CE TFC PC CE PC PC LT PC UT LT AG UT AG AG MP AG FL MP FL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Altresponse altprecedence altsuccession empty dicts

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Chainresponse IG DD AG MP MP FL Chainprecedence same Chainsuccession same

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: What if the design fails TFC or CE then the process stops But the scenario doesnt mention rejection activities so maybe we can assume that all activities are mandatory the model is for the happy path where the product is launched

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Proceeding with that assumption that all activities are mandatory so existence includes all

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This seems solid Now lets write the Python dictionary
